# hookbook.dev

> A curated, honestly-labeled cookbook for Claude Code hooks. Editorial, opinionated, MIT-licensed.

## Site map

- [/recipes/](https://hookbook.dev/recipes/) — all recipes, filterable
- [/events/](https://hookbook.dev/events/) — reference for all 29 hook events
- [/pitfalls/](https://hookbook.dev/pitfalls/) — common mistakes
- [/methodology/](https://hookbook.dev/methodology/) — trust labels explained
- [/changelog/](https://hookbook.dev/changelog/) — public log of trust-tier promotions
- [/about/](https://hookbook.dev/about/) — what this is

## Source

Open source on GitHub: https://github.com/Rogue899/hookbook
